title: World Cup 2026 Group B guide - fixtures, schedule, standings and odds for Canada, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Qatar and Switzerland
original_text: World Cup Group B sees co-hosts Canada play the first fixture in their home country against Bosnia-Herzegovina, followed by games against Qatar and Switzerland. More World Cup group guides: Group A | Group C | Group D | Group E | Group F | Group G | Group H | Group I | Group J | Group K | Group L World Cup Group B fixtures All kick-off times are BST World Cup Group B table World Cup Group B supercomputer prediction World Cup Group B stats Canada guide Canada fixtures All kick-off times are BST Friday June 12: Canada 1-1 Bosnia-Herzegovina , kick-off 8pm - Toronto, Canada Thursday June 18: Canada vs Qatar , kick-off 11pm - Vancouver, Canada Wednesday June 24: Switzerland vs Canada , kick-off 8pm - Vancouver, Canada squad Goalkeepers: Maxime Crepeau (Orlando City), Owen Goodman (Barnsley), Dayne St. Clair (Inter Miami). Defenders: Moise Bombito (Nice), Derek Cornelius (Rangers), Alphonso Davies (Bayern Munich), Luc de Fougerolles (Dender EH), Alistair Johnston (Celtic), Alfie Jones (Middlesbrough), Richie Laryea (Toronto), Niko Sigur (Hajduk Split), Joel Waterman (Chicago Fire). Midfielders: Ali Ahmed (Norwich), Tajon Buchanan (Villarreal), Mathieu Choiniere (LAFC), Stephen Eustaquio (LAFC), Ismael Kone (Sassuolo), Liam Millar (Hull), Jonathan Osorio (Toronto), Nathan-Dylan Saliba (Anderlecht), Jacob Shaffelburg (LAFC). Forwards: Jonathan David (Juventus), Promise David (Union Saint-Gilloise), Cyle Larin (Southampton), Tani Oluwaseyi (Villarreal), Jayden Nelson (Austin FC). Manager: Jesse Marsch Canada kits VOTE!
